mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase discount rates for equity valuations, directly compressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive mean during rate increases with t-stat > 2.0, or rolling Rank IC exceeds 0.05 in tightening periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 4.5 percent, labor market slack signals impending earnings deterioration, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >65% of months where UNRATE crosses above 4.5, or signal loses predictive power with IC < 0.02 in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between real GDP growth and aggregate retail sales indicates weakening consumer demand relative to output, forecasting negative equity returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term between GDPC1 and RSAFS yields a statistically insignificant coefficient with p > 0.10 in a 60-day return regression over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Declines in the index of industrial production reflect supply-side bottlenecks that compress corporate margins, generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days during late-cycle expansions.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are non-negative when INDPRO declines, or the signal predictive accuracy drops below 52% in late-cycle regimes during out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index levels above 240 trigger aggressive central bank tightening expectations, which compress equity valuations and produce negative forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 delivers positive 20-day returns in >70% of observations where CPIAUCSL exceeds 240, or the threshold effect vanishes in a structural break test.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous deceleration in total nonfarm payrolls and rising unemployment indicates a broad labor market contraction, forecasting negative equity returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns when both conditions are met, with a walk-forward classification accuracy below 50% over a 24-month horizon.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly housing starts serve as a leading indicator of broader economic activity; higher housing construction volumes predict positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show no positive correlation with HOUST levels, or the Rank IC remains below 0.01 across all rolling 3-year estimation windows.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production falls below the 2017 baseline index of 100, it signals severe supply chain degradation that immediately pressures equity prices, yielding negative returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of instances where INDPRO drops below 100, or the threshold signal loses statistical significance in a placebo test.
